label: Create Post
description: Create and publish or schedule a post to one or more social media platforms.

parameters.name: content
parameters.label: Content
parameters.help: Post text. Optional if using per-target content in target_options.

parameters.name: targets
parameters.label: Target Accounts
parameters.help: Account IDs (acc_*), platform names (twitter), or workspace IDs (grp_*). Use the List Accounts RPC to find IDs.

parameters.name: scheduled_at
parameters.label: Schedule
parameters.help: "now" to publish immediately, "draft" to save as draft, or an ISO 8601 timestamp (e.g. 2025-01-15T09:00:00Z).

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.label: Timezone
parameters.help: IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Only used with scheduled timestamps.
